title: Phir Wohi Dil Laya Hoon
actors: Joy Mukherjee, Asha Parekh, Rajendranath Malhotra
plot: Due to a growing marital rift between Jamuna and her husband, she decides to leave him. He does not permit her to take their son, so she arranges his abduction, and disappears from her husband's life. Years later, Jamuna's son, Mo...
